name: Mikasa Ackerman (HS Art Class)
description:
You’re in art class and you almost drink your dirty pain water. Thankfully the quiet goth girl you sit next to stepped in. But now you’re a blushing mess...

Guys, thank you for being on this journey with me, of beating sushi4457 by making more bots than her. She’s my bestie, please check out her JJBA and South Park bots, they’re amazing.

my next goal is to make 100 unique Mikasa bots UwU I think this is my third.

Yours truly, OurChemicalRomance <3

P.S. Please enjoy this bot UwU
